prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In the colorful coral reef, there lived a shy little octopus named Ollie. Ollie had eight wiggly arms and big, curious eyes, but he was too nervous to say hello to the other sea creatures. Every day, he watched the fish play and wished he could join in and make new friends. Deep down, Ollie dreamed of the day when he would feel brave enough to say, “Hi, can we be friends?”
